details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2029.4 using the stock FM input deck.
runs.group: Stock FAIR Model
runs.label: Stock FAIR Model 2/2026
runs.summary: Untouched stock FAIR model reference run.

details: Phase paths are exact SAMEVALUE controls, so the deck can read fmexog more than once without doubling the ramp.
JGCOLA and MWCOLA are both set to 0.0.
RS is endogenous.
